settings.content:
Please read these Terms & Conditions carefully before placing an order or using this website. By accessing or purchasing from Dummiez, you agree to be bound by these terms.

1. Age Restriction

You must be 21 years of age or older to purchase products from Dummiez. By placing an order, you confirm that you are of legal age in your jurisdiction to purchase hemp-derived or cannabis-infused products. We reserve the right to cancel any order where age verification cannot be confirmed.

2. Eligibility & Prohibited Locations

Our products are intended for adults in jurisdictions where the sale of hemp-derived products is lawful. It is your responsibility to ensure that the products you order are legal to purchase, possess, and consume in your state or territory. Dummiez does not ship to states or localities where such products are prohibited by law.

3. Product Information & Health Disclaimer

The products sold by Dummiez are hemp-derived edibles and have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration (FDA). These products are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease or medical condition. Consult a licensed healthcare provider before use, especially if you are pregnant, nursing, taking medications, or have a medical condition.

Consuming cannabis products may impair your ability to drive or operate machinery. Do not drive or operate heavy machinery after use. Keep all products out of reach of children and pets.

4. Orders & Payment

All orders are subject to availability and confirmation of the order price. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order at our sole discretion. Payment must be received in full before orders are processed and shipped. We accept the payment methods listed at checkout.

5. Shipping & Delivery

Dummiez ships to eligible states within the United States. Shipping times are estimates and are not guaranteed. We are not responsible for delays caused by carriers, weather, or other circumstances outside our control. Risk of loss passes to you upon delivery to the carrier.

6. Returns & Refunds

Due to the consumable nature of our products, all sales are final. We do not accept returns or exchanges on opened or used products. If you receive a damaged or incorrect item, contact us within 7 days of delivery at the email address on our Contact page and we will work to make it right.

7. Intellectual Property

All content on this website — including logos, text, images, graphics, and product designs — is the property of Dummiez and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or use any content without prior written permission.

8. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Dummiez shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of our products or this website. Our total liability to you for any claim arising from a purchase shall not exceed the amount you paid for that order.

9. Governing Law

These Terms & Conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of California, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts located in California.

10. Changes to These Terms

We reserve the right to update or modify these Terms & Conditions at any time. Changes will be effective upon posting to this page. Continued use of our website or services after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.

11. Contact

If you have any questions about these Terms & Conditions, please visit our Contact page.
